overview: RegenCen provides physician-led hormone therapy, longevity medicine, and regenerative care for men and women in midlife and beyond. Treatment is personalized and evidence-based, with ongoing monitoring to maintain optimal hormone levels.
highlights: Hormone pellets with 5-6 month steady release
PRF joint and tissue rejuvenation treatments
targetAudience: Men and women in midlife and beyond seeking to optimize hormone levels and support long-term health.
